# Port target: `eslint-plugin-perfectionist`

| | |
|---|---|
| Upstream repo | https://github.com/azat-io/eslint-plugin-perfectionist |
| Submodule | `upstream/eslint-plugin-perfectionist` @ `v5.9.0` |
| Baseline npm version | `5.9.0` |
| License | MIT |
| Oxlint native support | none — port target |
| Rules to port | 23 |

## Rules

| # | Rule | Description | Docs |
|---|------|-------------|------|
| 1 | `sort-array-includes` | Enforce sorted arrays before include method. | [docs](https://perfectionist.dev/rules/sort-array-includes) |
| 2 | `sort-arrays` | Enforce sorted arrays. | [docs](https://perfectionist.dev/rules/sort-arrays) |
| 3 | `sort-classes` | Enforce sorted classes. | [docs](https://perfectionist.dev/rules/sort-classes) |
| 4 | `sort-decorators` | Enforce sorted decorators. | [docs](https://perfectionist.dev/rules/sort-decorators) |
| 5 | `sort-enums` | Enforce sorted TypeScript enums. | [docs](https://perfectionist.dev/rules/sort-enums) |
| 6 | `sort-export-attributes` | Enforce sorted export attributes. | [docs](https://perfectionist.dev/rules/sort-export-attributes) |
| 7 | `sort-exports` | Enforce sorted exports. | [docs](https://perfectionist.dev/rules/sort-exports) |
| 8 | `sort-heritage-clauses` | Enforce sorted heritage clauses. | [docs](https://perfectionist.dev/rules/sort-heritage-clauses) |
| 9 | `sort-import-attributes` | Enforce sorted import attributes. | [docs](https://perfectionist.dev/rules/sort-import-attributes) |
| 10 | `sort-imports` | Enforce sorted imports. | [docs](https://perfectionist.dev/rules/sort-imports) |
| 11 | `sort-interfaces` | Enforce sorted interface properties. | [docs](https://perfectionist.dev/rules/sort-interfaces) |
| 12 | `sort-intersection-types` | Enforce sorted intersection types. | [docs](https://perfectionist.dev/rules/sort-intersection-types) |
| 13 | `sort-jsx-props` | Enforce sorted JSX props. | [docs](https://perfectionist.dev/rules/sort-jsx-props) |
| 14 | `sort-maps` | Enforce sorted Map elements. | [docs](https://perfectionist.dev/rules/sort-maps) |
| 15 | `sort-modules` | Enforce sorted modules. | [docs](https://perfectionist.dev/rules/sort-modules) |
| 16 | `sort-named-exports` | Enforce sorted named exports. | [docs](https://perfectionist.dev/rules/sort-named-exports) |
| 17 | `sort-named-imports` | Enforce sorted named imports. | [docs](https://perfectionist.dev/rules/sort-named-imports) |
| 18 | `sort-object-types` | Enforce sorted object types. | [docs](https://perfectionist.dev/rules/sort-object-types) |
| 19 | `sort-objects` | Enforce sorted objects. | [docs](https://perfectionist.dev/rules/sort-objects) |
| 20 | `sort-sets` | Enforce sorted sets. | [docs](https://perfectionist.dev/rules/sort-sets) |
| 21 | `sort-switch-case` | Enforce sorted switch cases. | [docs](https://perfectionist.dev/rules/sort-switch-case) |
| 22 | `sort-union-types` | Enforce sorted union types. | [docs](https://perfectionist.dev/rules/sort-union-types) |
| 23 | `sort-variable-declarations` | Enforce sorted variable declarations. | [docs](https://perfectionist.dev/rules/sort-variable-declarations) |
